Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 4: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.
Phase 5: same attack_surface=['web'] and phase_hint='any'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the web category. Fits when the engagement needs: [1]: https://twitter.com/unethicalsalt [1.1]: http://i.imgur.com/tXSoThF.png.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: [1]: https://twitter.com/unethicalsalt [1.1]: http://i.imgur.com/tXSoThF.png.
documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `whatwaf --wafs`. Further invocations from upstream: `Airlock (Phion/Ergon)`; `ASP.NET Generic Website Protection (MS)`. [1]: https://twitter.com/unethicalsalt [1.1]: http://i.imgur.com/tXSoThF.png.
